task:
Regenerate the Oz dashboard UI bundle so the deployed artifact reflects the already-committed Skills->Plays rename. CONTEXT: Commit 0645573 ('ui: rename Skills Plays labels to Plays') already removed every 'Skills' string from the renderer SOURCE (packages/ui/src/renderer/**), and all 159 UI tests pass. The founder still sees 'Skills' in the left nav ONLY because the built bundle packages/ui/out/renderer/assets/index-*.js is STALE (it still contains 'Skills (Plays)' strings: ROUTE_TITLE plays label, the Plays ScreenHeader title, the empty-state text, and the new-team craft-modal placeholder). out/ is gitignored, so the rename never regenerated it.

WHAT TO DO: Run the production build to regenerate the bundle:  pnpm --dir packages/ui build  (electron-vite build). Do NOT edit any source files — the source is already correct. Do NOT hand-edit anything under out/. Do NOT run git.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (provide command output as evidence for each):
1. The build command exits 0.
2. After the build, grep the regenerated renderer assets for the old label and show it is GONE:  grep -rni 'Skills' packages/ui/out/renderer/assets/  returns no matches (the only acceptable matches would be unrelated path strings like 'claude-skills'; the nav/header/placeholder 'Skills (Plays)' strings must be absent).
3. Confirm 'Plays' is present in the regenerated bundle (e.g. ROUTE_TITLE and nav label now read 'Plays').
4. pnpm --dir packages/ui test still passes (report the summary line).

WHAT MUST NOT BREAK: no source edits; UI test suite stays green; the build must be a real, complete electron-vite build (renderer + main), not a partial.

IF THE BUILD FAILS: this has happened before (failure class ui-bundle-rebuild-failed). Do NOT work around it by editing the bundle by hand or weakening anything. Report the exact failing command and full error output so it can be routed to machinery repair.

WRITE SCOPE: packages/ui/** (build output only). NOTE: out/ is gitignored so this produces no committed diff; the deliverable is a clean regenerated bundle plus the evidence above.
